metadata.description: Demo data for Process Documentation Dashboard - Lead-to-Cash process

mainProcessFlow.mermaid:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Lead_Gen[Lead Generation]
        A[Marketing Campaign] --> B[Web Form / Event]
        B --> C{Lead Created}
    end
    
    subgraph Lead_Qual[Lead Qualification]
        C --> D[Auto-Assignment]
        D --> E[SDR Outreach]
        E --> F{Qualified?}
        F -->|No| G[Nurture Campaign]
        G --> E
        F -->|Yes| H[Convert to Opportunity]
    end
    
    subgraph Sales_Process[Sales Process]
        H --> I[Discovery Call]
        I --> J[Demo / POC]
        J --> K{Decision?}
        K -->|No| L[Follow-up]
        L --> J
        K -->|Yes| M[Proposal]
    end
    
    subgraph Closing[Deal Closing]
        M --> N[Negotiation]
        N --> O{Approved?}
        O -->|No| P[Revise Terms]
        P --> N
        O -->|Yes| Q[Contract Signed]
    end
    
    subgraph Fulfillment[Order Fulfillment]
        Q --> R[Create Order]
        R --> S[Provision Services]
        S --> T[Customer Onboarding]
        T --> U[Go Live]
    end
    
    style A fill:#5F3B8C,color:#fff
    style H fill:#22C55E,color:#fff
    style Q fill:#22C55E,color:#fff
    style U fill:#22C55E,color:#fff
    style F fill:#F59E0B
    style K fill:#F59E0B
    style O fill:#F59E0B

systemInteractions.mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    participant W as Website
    participant SF as Salesforce
    participant MK as Marketing Automation
    participant FI as Finance System
    participant CS as CS Platform
    
    W->>SF: Lead Created
    SF->>MK: Trigger Nurture
    MK-->>SF: Update Lead Score
    SF->>SF: Auto-Assignment
    Note over SF: SDR Qualification
    SF->>SF: Convert to Opportunity
    Note over SF: Sales Process
    SF->>FI: Create Quote
    FI-->>SF: Quote Approved
    SF->>FI: Create Order
    FI->>CS: Provision Account
    CS-->>SF: Update Account Status
    CS->>CS: Onboarding Workflow

processSteps.name: Lead Capture
processSteps.description: Marketing generates leads through campaigns, events, and web forms

processSteps.name: Lead Routing
processSteps.description: Automatic assignment based on territory, product interest, and round-robin

processSteps.name: SDR Outreach
processSteps.description: Sales Development Rep qualifies lead through discovery calls

processSteps.name: Opportunity Creation
processSteps.description: Convert qualified lead to opportunity with account and contact

processSteps.name: Discovery & Demo
processSteps.description: AE conducts deep discovery and product demonstration

processSteps.name: Negotiation
processSteps.description: Terms negotiation and discount approval if needed

processSteps.name: Order Creation
processSteps.description: Create order record and trigger fulfillment

integrationMap.mermaid:
erDiagram
    MARKETING_AUTOMATION ||--o{ LEAD : generates
    LEAD ||--|| SALESFORCE : stored_in
    SALESFORCE ||--o{ OPPORTUNITY : converts_to
    OPPORTUNITY ||--|| QUOTE : creates
    QUOTE }|--|| CPQ : configured_by
    QUOTE ||--|| CONTRACT : becomes
    CONTRACT ||--|| DOCUSIGN : signed_via
    CONTRACT ||--|| ORDER : triggers
    ORDER ||--|| ERP : synced_to
    ERP ||--|| BILLING : invoices
    ORDER ||--|| PROVISIONING : triggers
    PROVISIONING ||--|| CS_PLATFORM : notifies
